recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Prelude to a Kiss
recommendations.overview: A couple fall in love despite the girl's pessimistic outlook. As they struggle to come to terms with their relationship, something supernatural happens that tests it.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Bridesmaids
recommendations.overview: Two women plot revenge against the woman marrying their friend's ex-boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Chéri
recommendations.overview: The son of a courtesan retreats into a fantasy world after being forced to end his relationship with the older woman who educated him in the ways of love.

recommendations.title: Girl in the Basement
recommendations.overview: Sara is a teen girl who is looking forward to her 18th birthday to move away from her controlling father Don. But before she could even blow out the candles, Don imprisons her in the basement of their home.

recommendations.title: Cinderella Man
recommendations.overview: The true story of boxer Jim Braddock who, following his retirement in the 1930s, makes a surprise comeback in order to lift his family out of poverty.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Hairspray Live!
recommendations.genres: Romance, Comedy, Drama, TV Movie, Music
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl living in Baltimore in the early 1960s dreams of appearing on a popular TV dance show.
